title: Creamy Garlic Norwegian Soup
description: An energizing norwegian dish featuring a blend of vegetable stock, low-fat-friendly ingredients, and a rich garlic flavor profile to start your day or as a light lunch option.

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: about 1 tablespoon fresh or 1 teaspoon minced dried garlic can be used instead.

ingredients.name: nutritional yeast flakes
ingredients.notes: for added creaminess and umami flavor

instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, combine vegetable stock and low-sodium broth. Add minced garlic, celery pieces, and onions.
Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes until the vegetables are soft.
Blend soup using an immersion blender directly in the pot or transfer half of the mixture to a regular blender. Blend until smooth.
Return the blended soup to the pot and stir in softened cream cheese and nutritional yeast flakes. Warm gently over low heat, stirring occasionally, until thickened slightly.
Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste. Garnish with chopped basil leaves if desired.
